title: Lamu Cultural Festival
description: Annual Swahili celebration with dhow races, poetry, and night markets in Lamu Old Town.
highlights:
Dhow races
Swahili poetry
Night markets
Street processions
directions: Plan bus/boat early; festival fills guesthouses.
public_transport: Book transport weeks ahead; fares spike.
safety_and_conditions: Cash for street food; respect local customs.
travel_tips: Free street events; paid dhow races vary.
ticket_price: Free street events; dhow seats from KES 500
event_description: Dhow races, donkey races, Swahili poetry, and food stalls.

title: Nairobi Night Market
description: Monthly street food and makers market in Westlands — pay-as-you-go budget evening out.
highlights:
Street food
Live DJs
Local makers
Pay as you go
directions: Matatu or ride-hail to Westlands venue.
travel_tips: Arrive early for shorter food lines.
event_description: Food stalls, DJs, and artisan vendors.

title: Rift Valley Acoustic Sessions
description: Lake Naivasha waterfront acoustic sets and campfire stories — budget weekend tickets.
highlights:
Lakefront music
Campfire
Local artists
Budget entry
directions: Matatu to Naivasha, boda to lakeside camp venue.
safety_and_conditions: Lake shore at night — stay in designated venue.
travel_tips: Bring camp chair if you have one.
event_description: Acoustic sets, poetry, and campfire storytelling.

title: Mara Community Run
description: Conservation run near Maasai Mara gateway with local guides — fees support schools.
highlights:
Conservation run
Community guides
School fundraiser
Mara gateway
directions: Bus to Narok/Talek; register online or at gate.
travel_tips: Combine with budget camp safari same weekend.
event_description: 5K/10K routes with Maasai guides; proceeds to schools.

title: Koroga Festival Nairobi
description: Afro-fusion food and music festival — early-bird tickets keep costs reasonable.
highlights:
Live music
Food vendors
City festival
Early-bird tickets
directions: Ride-hail or matatu to venue (varies per edition).
safety_and_conditions: Crowds and loud music — ear protection optional.
what_to_carry: Ticket QR, cash for food, power bank.
travel_tips: Buy early-bird online to save KES 1,000+.
event_description: Afro-fusion music, food stalls, and art.

title: Lamu Yoga Festival
description: Beach and rooftop yoga sessions across Lamu — community classes and dhow sunsets.
highlights:
Beach yoga
Dhow sunsets
Wellness on budget
Community classes
directions: Same access as Lamu; book guesthouse early.
travel_tips: Day-pass classes cheaper than full festival pass.
event_description: Open-air yoga, meditation, and dhow sunset sails.

title: Lake Turkana Festival
description: Northern cultural festival celebrating Lake Turkana communities — remote but unforgettable.
highlights:
Northern cultures
Lake Turkana
Traditional dance
Overland adventure
directions: Convoy or bus packages from Nairobi; rough roads.
public_transport: Festival tour packages KES 15,000+ from Nairobi.
travel_tips: Join group overland to split costs.
event_description: Traditional music, boat regattas, and cultural pavilions.

title: Maralal Camel Derby
description: World-famous camel races in Samburu — camping and festivities on a northern Kenya budget trip.
highlights:
Camel races
Northern festival
Camping
Samburu culture
directions: Bus to Maralal; camp in town fields.
event_description: Camel races, cycling races, and cultural shows.

title: Diani Beach Reggae Sundowner
description: Free sunset reggae on the sand with local food vendors — monthly coast gathering.
highlights:
Sunset reggae
Beach vibes
Free entry
Street food
directions: SGR to Mombasa, matatu/tuk-tuk to Diani beach strip.
event_description: DJ sets, drum circles, and beach food stalls.

title: Nairobi Cycling Festival
description: Karura Forest loops, repair workshops, and budget gear swaps — family-friendly city event.
highlights:
Forest loops
Repair workshops
Gear swap
Family rides
directions: Matatu to Karura gates; festival signage on event day.
travel_tips: Register online for free workshop slots.
event_description: Guided loops, bike repair clinics, and gear swap stalls.
